reply: I've reviewed the feedback from gemini-code-assist. The suggested improvements for efficiency and completeness have been implemented.
Refactored the deletion logic to use 'AnyAsync' for better performance and added the check for 'SessionLineupItems' to prevent foreign key violations. Thanks for the catch!
Updated the merge logic to use a database transaction, ensuring that all bulk updates and the final deletion are atomic.
Removed '.ToLower()' from the search query to allow the database to use its own collation and indexes efficiently.
Confirmed. The dependency check now uses 'AnyAsync' and includes all relevant tables.
I have addressed all the feedback from gemini-code-assist in the latest update. The logic is now more robust and efficient.
I have reviewed the responses and applied all recommendations, including transactional safety for merges and optimized dependency checks for deletions.
